examples: The club will celebrate its centenary next year.
The centenary of the author's birth in 1905 went uncelebrated.
20 newly discovered letters were added for the 1990 Dutch centenary edition.
This year marks the centenary of Benjamin Britten (1913-1976), a gentle but enduring musical voice.
No wonder that, in Spain, this year will be the centenary of el desastre.
